session_title: TODO audit, pipeline integrity, SIN scanner, P011 dedupe, pre-commit gate, task dispatch wiring

changes.change: Added 'checkpoints' and 'UPM' to excludeDirs array; previously missing, causing .history archive copies to be scanned (2330 files vs ~200 live files).

Fixed Invoke-IntegrityGate: moved Test-PipelineArtifactIntegrity BEFORE Invoke-PipelineArtifactRefresh. Previously the refresh ran first, making isHealthy always true and the FAILED branch dead code. cronSuccess is now meaningful.

Added Invoke-ScheduledTaskDispatch (Step 3.7): reads cron-aiathon-schedule.json and calls Invoke-CronJob for every enabled task whose frequency window has elapsed or lastRun is null. Wires all 12 never-run scheduled tasks into the 10-minute cron cycle.

Replaced simplistic $hashPos = $lines[$i].IndexOf('#') inline comment check with a string-aware character-walk parser that correctly skips # characters inside single/double quoted string literals. Eliminates false negatives from patterns like $x = 'foo#bar' ?? 'baz'.

Renamed Test-IntegrityManifest → Test-SASCSignedManifest (HMAC-signed SASC-specific version). Updated all 4 internal callers and the Export-ModuleMember list. Eliminates P011 SIN collision with the generic PwShGUI-IntegrityCore.psm1 Test-IntegrityManifest.

Created new CI gate script (4 gates): G1 PowerShell parse errors, G2 critical SIN patterns P001/P009/P010, G3 UTF-8 BOM encoding, G4 VersionTag alignment. Exit 0=pass, 1=fail. Supports -StagedFiles, -Quiet, -FailOnWarning, -OutputJson.
Normalized block comment tag: '<# ToDo:' → '<# TODO:' (consistent with project standard).
Normalized comment tag: '# Note:' → '# NOTE:' (consistent with project standard).

deviations_found: # todo #> (Get-PesterReport.ps1 - inside block comment, left as-is)
